market_assessment: bearish: All majors negative. BCH crashed -9.3% from $415 to $348 low, currently bouncing to $375 (+7.8% short-covering bounce). BTC at $77,309 failing to reclaim $78K. ETH at $2,143 testing $2,091 support. DOGE -6.1% accelerating downside. The bounce is a dead cat bounce in an active downtrend. CRITICAL: Two real positions (ETH 150x, BCH 75x) within $5 of liquidation from previous config's 'close all' command that wasn't executed. IMMEDIATE CLOSURE REQUIRED.
